Meaning / Notes: Effect Fragment - WHAT happens (adjective name). Holds the effects list + mana base cost.
Modifier Fragment - WHERE/HOW it lands (noun/verb name). Tile pattern + spatial modifiers.
Run-long passive. Uses the PassiveEffect system (Trigger/Target/Effect) and/or keyword overlays.
Run-defining pick. Has Passive(s) + a once-per-battle Active ability + optional keyword overlays.
baseValue = damage per hit. Hits whatever entity is on an affected tile (no friend/foe filter).
baseValue = block granted to entity on tile.
baseValue = HP restored to entity on tile.
baseValue = stacks; set statusType. Applies a Status to entity on tile.
baseValue = tiles displaced AWAY from anchor. Collisions deal damage.
NOT IMPLEMENTED - logs and does nothing. Needs custom code.
Deal value dmg at start of turn, then -1. (DoT)
Deal value dmg at start of turn, then halve. (DoT, front-loaded)
Extra value direct dmg per hit TAKEN. -1/turn.
Extra value block-only dmg per hit (no HP overflow). -1/turn.
Next incoming hit dealt = 0 dmg (secondary effects still land). -1 per hit.
Reflect value dmg to attacker. -1 per hit.
Knocked back value tiles when hit. -1/turn.
value% crit chance (crit = x2 dmg). Halved/turn.
Next incoming hit is a guaranteed crit (x2). -1 per hit.
Auto from Strike effect. Do NOT hand-add.
Must set on fragment. Ranged identity.
Must set. NOTE: no built-in payoff logic yet.
Must set. NOTE: no built-in payoff logic yet.
Pattern anchors on player's tile; no rotation.
Player picks a direction; pattern rotates to face it. Author offsets facing UP (+y).
Player drops the pattern anywhere; anchor = clicked tile.
Modifier only applies if card has ALL listed keywords (empty = always). Order: global mods first, then per-tile.
Fires only on its own tile. Use for Volatile, Echoing, Anchored, Binding, Draining.
Fires on every affected tile. Use for Ignition splash, Corruption spread, Crushing collision.
AND-all required; NONE-of excluded. Lets you author 'non-X Orders do Y'.
Always-on stat change at battle start. Uses statType + statValue, no target/effects.
Player lands a Strike. Context entity = StrikeTarget; amount = damage.
A card is played. Supports requiredCardKeywords filter.
An enemy dies. Context entity = the enemy.
Player RECEIVES a status. Use statusCondition (Any/Specific/AnyOf).
Player is struck. Context entity = Attacker; amount = damage.
Player loses HP (net > 0). amount = HP lost.
Custom behavior handled in code by Commander name/ID.
All living player units (heal/block/buffs hit the whole squad).
Closest by Manhattan distance to selected unit.
Entity that just hit the player (OnHit context).
Apply baseValue stacks of whichever status triggered (OnStatusApplied).
Fires when status is in statusSet.
value = duration AND magnitude; decays each round.
value = duration only; binary effect (no magnitude).
Player movement, dash, reposition, free moves.
Setup-then-payoff (needs Special code for true detonation).
